requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act + KS C IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》+ KS C IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》+ KS C IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances (refrigerators, freezers, refrigerator-freezer combinations, wine coolers, ice-cream appliances) placed on the South Korean market must comply with the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act, administered by KATS under MOTIE. The specific applicable standard is KS C IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read in conjunction with the general standard KS C IEC 60335-1. Household refrigerators are generally classified for KC Safety Confirmation (안전확인, Self-regulatory Safety Confirmation) — the manufacturer or importer obtains a test report from a KATS-designated testing body (such as KTC, KTL or KTR), confirms conformity, and registers the model before placing the KC mark. Higher-risk products require full KC Safety Certification (안전인증) with factory inspection; lower-risk items use Supplier's Conformity Confirmation (공급자적합성확인). Key requirements cover: protection against electric shock; insulation resistance and dielectric strength; thermal cut-outs; creepage and clearance distances; mechanical strength of housing; earthing continuity; and appliance markings.
summary.zh: 投放韩国市场的家用制冷器具（电冰箱、冷冻箱、冰箱-冷冻箱组合、酒柜、冰淇淋器具）须符合由产业通商资源部下属KATS管理的《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》。适用的产品专项标准为KS C IEC 60335-2-24（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），须与通用标准KS C IEC 60335-1结合使用。家用电冰箱通常归类为KC安全确认（안전확인，自律安全确认）——制造商或进口商从KATS指定检测机构（如KTC、KTL或KTR）取得检测报告，确认符合性，并在加贴KC标志前登记型号。较高风险产品须进行附带工厂审查的完整KC安全认证（안전인증）；较低风险产品采用供应商符合性确认（공급자적합성확인）。核心要求涵盖：防触电保护；绝缘电阻与介电强度；热断路器；爬电距离与电气间隙；外壳机械强度；接地连续性；及器具标识。
summary.zht: 投放韓國市場的家用製冷器具（電冰箱、冷凍箱、冰箱-冷凍箱組合、酒櫃、冰淇淋器具）須符合由產業通商資源部下屬KATS管理的《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》。適用的產品專項標準為KS C IEC 60335-2-24（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），須與通用標準KS C IEC 60335-1結合使用。家用電冰箱通常歸類為KC安全確認（안전확인，自律安全確認）——製造商或進口商從KATS指定檢測機構（如KTC、KTL或KTR）取得檢測報告，確認符合性，並在加貼KC標誌前登記型號。較高風險產品須進行附帶工廠審查的完整KC安全認證（안전인증）；較低風險產品採用供應商符合性確認（공급자적합성확인）。核心要求涵蓋：防觸電保護；絕緣電阻與介電強度；熱斷路器；爬電距離與電氣間隙；外殼機械強度；接地連續性；及器具標識。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act (전기용품 및 생활용품 안전관리법) — KATS/MOTIE

KS C IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (Korean standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24)
KS C IEC 60335-1 — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
KC Safety Confirmation (안전확인) — applicable conformity route for household refrigerators; testing by KATS-designated bodies (KTC / KTL / KTR)

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), which is technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 but incorporates Chinese national deviations. GB 4706.13-2014 is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime. Products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before sale in China. CCC test reports issued by Chinese laboratories against GB 4706.13 are NOT accepted as equivalent evidence under the Korean KC Safety Confirmation conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），该标准技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010，但包含中国国家偏差。GB 4706.13-2014为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度监督执行。产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。中国实验室依据GB 4706.13出具的CCC检测报告不被韩国KC安全确认合格评定路径接受为等效证据。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），該標準技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010，但包含中國國家偏差。GB 4706.13-2014為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度監督執行。產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。中國實驗室依據GB 4706.13出具的CCC檢測報告不被韓國KC安全確認合格評定路徑接受為等效證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Both KS C IEC 60335-2-24 and GB 4706.13-2014 adopt IEC 60335-2-24 as their technical base, so the substantive safety requirements are closely aligned; the gaps are certification-procedure and national-deviation related: (1) Re-certification obligation — KC Safety Confirmation (안전확인) requires a test report from a KATS-designated body (KTC, KTL, KTR) referencing KS C IEC 60335-2-24, plus model registration before the KC mark is applied; a Chinese CNAS/CCC report cannot substitute without re-testing, although an IECEE CB Scheme report (IEC 60335-2-24 basis) issued by an NCB may reduce the re-testing scope under Korea's CB acceptance practice — verify with a qualified Korean certification consultant. (2) National deviations — Korea applies its own deviations (including 220 V / 60 Hz supply conditions, plug/earthing arrangements per KS C 8305, and Korean-language markings and instructions) that differ from China's GB 4706.13 deviations, so Chinese CCC test data cannot be assumed to cover KS C IEC 60335-2-24 requirements without engineering review. (3) Local holder — the KC certificate/registration must be held by the manufacturer or its Korean importer, who retains the technical documentation.
gap.zh: KS C IEC 60335-2-24与GB 4706.13-2014均以IEC 60335-2-24为技术基础，因此实质安全要求高度对齐；差距在于认证程序和国家偏差：（1）重新认证义务——KC安全确认（안전확인）须取得KATS指定机构（KTC、KTL、KTR）依据KS C IEC 60335-2-24出具的检测报告，并在加贴KC标志前完成型号登记；中国CNAS/CCC报告未经重新检测不能替代，但NCB出具的IECEE CB体系报告（基于IEC 60335-2-24）在韩国CB接受惯例下可缩减重新检测范围——请与合格的韩国认证顾问核实。（2）国家偏差——韩国适用其自有偏差（包括220 V/60 Hz供电条件、依据KS C 8305的插头/接地方式、韩文标识及说明书），与中国GB 4706.13偏差不同，故中国CCC检测数据不能在未经工程评审下默认涵盖KS C IEC 60335-2-24要求。（3）本地持有人——KC证书/登记须由制造商或其韩国进口商持有，并保存技术文件。
gap.zht: KS C IEC 60335-2-24與GB 4706.13-2014均以IEC 60335-2-24為技術基礎，因此實質安全要求高度對齊；差距在於認證程序和國家偏差：（1）重新認證義務——KC安全確認（안전확인）須取得KATS指定機構（KTC、KTL、KTR）依據KS C IEC 60335-2-24出具的檢測報告，並在加貼KC標誌前完成型號登記；中國CNAS/CCC報告未經重新檢測不能替代，但NCB出具的IECEE CB體系報告（基於IEC 60335-2-24）在韓國CB接受慣例下可縮減重新檢測範圍——請與合格的韓國認證顧問核實。（2）國家偏差——韓國適用其自有偏差（包括220 V/60 Hz供電條件、依據KS C 8305的插頭/接地方式、韓文標識及說明書），與中國GB 4706.13偏差不同，故中國CCC檢測數據不能在未經工程評審下默認涵蓋KS C IEC 60335-2-24要求。（3）本地持有人——KC證書/登記須由製造商或其韓國進口商持有，並保存技術文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KC mark required before South Korean market placement under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act; KS C IEC 60335-2-24 is the applicable safety standard, with household refrigerators routed through KC Safety Confirmation (안전확인)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The KC mark under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act is mandatory for household refrigerating appliances in South Korea. KS C IEC 60335-2-24 (with KS C IEC 60335-1) is the applicable safety standard, and refrigerators are routed through KC Safety Confirmation (안전확인). Chinese CCC certification to GB 4706.13 does not satisfy the Korean KC pathway; testing to KS C IEC 60335-2-24 at a KATS-designated body (KTC / KTL / KTR) is required. An IECEE CB Scheme report may reduce re-testing scope — verify with a qualified Korean certification consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》，家用制冷器具须强制取得KC标志。KS C IEC 60335-2-24（配合KS C IEC 60335-1）为适用的安全标准，电冰箱通过KC安全确认（안전확인）路径。中国依据GB 4706.13取得的CCC认证不满足韩国KC路径；须在KATS指定机构（KTC/KTL/KTR）按KS C IEC 60335-2-24完成检测。IECEE CB体系报告或可缩减重新检测范围——请与合格的韩国认证顾问核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》，家用製冷器具須強制取得KC標誌。KS C IEC 60335-2-24（配合KS C IEC 60335-1）為適用的安全標準，電冰箱通過KC安全確認（안전확인）路徑。中國依據GB 4706.13取得的CCC認證不滿足韓國KC路徑；須在KATS指定機構（KTC/KTL/KTR）按KS C IEC 60335-2-24完成檢測。IECEE CB體系報告或可縮減重新檢測範圍——請與合格的韓國認證顧問核實。
